overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a sunny medieval harbor and historic town district. The character moves from wooden docks alongside a red cargo ship into cobblestone streets lined with half-timbered buildings and medieval architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden harbor dock alongside moored ships

events.description: character begins walking forward along the dock after initial stationary position

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the wooden dock beside the red ship, passing harbor workers and guards

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing near cargo sacks watching the dock
shirtless dock worker walking ahead on the wooden planks

entered.detail: large red medieval cargo ship with wooden railings, masts, and furled sails
weathered wooden pier surface with visible gaps between planks
thick nautical ropes wound on wooden bollards
tall wooden crane structure used for loading cargo onto ships
furled white canvas sails hanging from the ship's masts

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny harbor dock with Geralt standing near a large red cog ship. The wooden dock planks stretch alongside the vessel, with rope coils and harbor cranes visible. As Geralt begins walking, the camera follows in third-person, revealing the maritime environment with clear blue skies and various dock elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: harbor dock transitioning to town square entrance

events.description: ascending wooden stairs from lower dock level to upper town square

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking up wooden stairs from the dock into the town square, following an armored guard

notable_agents.action: armored guard in red walking up the stairs ahead of Geralt

entered.detail: large stone building with red tiled roof and arched doorways marking the town entrance
weathered wooden steps leading up from the dock to the town level

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues along the dock, moving away from the red ship toward a large stone warehouse building. The environment transitions as he ascends wooden stairs from the harbor level up into the town square, leaving the maritime elements behind and approaching the urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval town square with market stalls and half-timbered buildings

events.description: ground surface changes from wooden dock planks to cobblestone street
turning right into narrower street between half-timbered houses

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the bustling town square, navigating around NPCs and turning into narrower streets

notable_agents.action: woman in medieval dress walking past carrying a basket
muscular man carrying large sack on shoulder walking ahead

entered.detail: traditional medieval timber-framed building with yellow plaster and dark wooden beams
irregular stone paving typical of medieval European towns
simple wooden market stall with canvas awning and goods displayed

segments.scene_description: Having entered the town proper, Geralt walks across cobblestone streets surrounded by half-timbered medieval houses. The crowd density increases with various NPCs walking about their business. The stone warehouse building remains visible to the left while the character turns into a narrower street lined with timber-framed architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alleys between medieval buildings with puddles

events.description: entering darker narrow alley with puddles and wooden plank crossings

agents.ego_description: Geralt navigating through narrow back alleys, passing fewer pedestrians in quieter part of town

notable_agents.action: woman in simple dress walking toward camera then passing by

entered.detail: confined passage between tall medieval buildings with overhanging upper floors
planks laid over muddy puddles and wet ground in the alley

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes Geralt through narrow back alleys away from the main square. The space becomes more enclosed with half-timbered buildings on both sides, and the ground shows puddles with wooden planks laid across them. The crowd thins out as the character explores the quieter, darker passages of the medieval town.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, open maritime harbor into the enclosed, shadowed alleys of a medieval town. It begins on a sunny wooden dock beside a large red cog ship, following Geralt as he moves past harbor cranes and rope coils under a clear blue sky. As he leaves the vessel behind, the camera tracks him up a set of wooden stairs, shifting the environment from the waterfront level toward the urban architecture of a stone warehouse and town square. The scene then expands into bustling cobblestone streets lined with half-timbered houses and crowds of NPCs before turning away from the main square into narrower passages. Finally, the space becomes increasingly enclosed as the camera follows Geralt through quiet back alleys characterized by timber-framed buildings and puddles with wooden planks laid across the ground.
